headline: Assessing Boeing’s (BA) Valuation As Mixed Share Performance Meets Conflicting Undervaluation Signals
summary: Recent share performance and business scale Boeing (BA) has seen mixed share performance recently, with the stock down about 3% over the past month and roughly flat over the past 3 months, while the past year shows a gain of about 6%. At a recent close of US$224.30 and a market value of about US$182.2b, Boeing operates across three major segments: Commercial Airplanes; Defense, Space & Security; and Global Services, supported by worldwide customers. The company reports annual revenue of about...
